name: Woven Single Solar LED Outdoor Path Light Black - Threshold™
description:
For an elegant outdoor lighting solution, try this Woven Single Solar LED Outdoor Path Light from Threshold™. Made from plastic, this path light features a black body and a woven bronze-color shade on top. Solar powered, the light's integrated LED bulb offers ample illumination, and it has a stake on the bottom for easy installation. Plus, the weatherproof design promotes lasting outdoor use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
